expectations.text: Response summarizes/acknowledges what the user has already stated before asking questions
expectations.evidence: Lists the 4 platforms and guesses their usage patterns (partial - also adds assumptions)

expectations.text: Response asks at least one clarifying question about unknowns
expectations.evidence: Asks about '统一入口 vs 统一平台', document types, team skills, budget

expectations.text: Response asks only ONE main question (not a list of 5 questions)
expectations.evidence: Asks 4 major question groups simultaneously (目标, 文档类型, 技术水平, 预算)

expectations.text: Response does NOT generate a complete solution/plan/architecture in the first turn
expectations.evidence: Proposes 4 complete solution directions (A/B/C/D) and a 4-step implementation plan

expectations.text: Response probes key unknowns (primary users, search needs, permissions, budget/timeline, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Does mention team skills, budget, document types as questions

expectations.text: If asking a question, response provides multiple choice options rather than open-ended questions
expectations.evidence: Questions are open-ended ('是否愿意付费使用 SaaS 产品？' '能投入多少人力？') not structured options
